name: tjt_933_min
drl:
rule W3 when accumulate( E1(tag == "z", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
rule NE9 salience 2 when not E1() P() then end
_finding: D-166 GRADUATED (was a D-165 divergence cell): D-165 tj-tail family (event-not cell): an update to a blocked-under left in the blocker-expiry epoch (either side of the advance) hoists it to release-FIRST oracle-side; baseline release order (recency-DESC) matches both trees. Same root as the join cell: update-recency ordering the engine does not track. See docs/tj-tail-update-recency-mechanism.md. Minimal 2-rule reproducer of cf933x385.
